name: bitranspiler
description: Bidirectional C++ and x86 MASM Assembly Transpiler

scripts.build: g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -o BiTranspiler src/main.cpp src/lexer/CppLexer.cpp src/lexer/AsmLexer.cpp src/parser/CppParser.cpp src/parser/AsmParser.cpp src/codegen/AsmPrinter.cpp src/codegen/CppPrinter.cpp

author: Muhammad Abdullah Ismail
